MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Alexander Lemieux of the law offices of Alex Lemieux (805-341-8784) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, David Foran of the law offices of Sacramento and Foran (415-775-0891) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

DEFENDANTs EDMUND CHU, PETER CHIN, SUSAN LAI, and TAIA CHIN's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
is argued and submitted by both sides in open court. The Court sets aside the tentative ruling. The court takes the matter under submission. The Court will issue a written order/ruling. (Plaintiff's counsel submits proposed written order for the court's consideration.)
